channel.title: NALM Maloney, AH Yang, RA Princi, AJ Eichert, DR Hébert, TV Kupec, AE Mertz, R Vasyltsiv, TM Vijaya Kumar, GJ Walker, EJ Peralta, JL Hoffman, W Yin, CR Page | PlatCOVID

item.title: A COVID-19 Airway Management Innovation with Pragmatic Efficacy Evaluation: The Patient Particle Containment Chamber.
